sessionStart.prompt: At session start: if .cursor/session_log.mdc exists, read the top 3 entries for continuity. Honor Do not redo and Resume with from the latest AGENT_CONTEXT block. Do not load .cursor/qa_log.mdc unless the user asks about past Q&A.

stop.prompt: Before ending: apply the session-log skill (.cursor/skills/session-log/SKILL.md). If this was trivial one-off Q&A with no repo impact, prepend an entry to .cursor/qa_log.mdc; otherwise prepend to .cursor/session_log.mdc. Use UTC timestamps (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ). Do not skip logging.
